files.content: --- /** * @component Accordion * @title Accordion * @description Vertically stacked collapsible sections that let users show and hide content panels. * @figmaUrl https://www.figma.com/design/koxai7zw5vIuBzuVxe5T2l/BejamasUI---Design-System?node-id=2589-14086&t=YFStJ3V8fXEO8QD8-4 * * @preview * * * * * Is it accessible? * * * Yes. It adheres to WAI-ARIA design patterns. * * * * * Can I customize the icon? * * * Yes you can. * * * * * @usage * * ```astro nocollapse * --- * import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from '@bejamas/ui/components/accordion'; * --- * * * * * Is it accessible? * * * Yes. It adheres to WAI-ARIA design patterns. * * * * ``` * * @api * * ### Events * * The accordion emits custom events that you can listen to: * * | Event | Detail | Description | * |-------|--------|-------------| * | `accordion:change` | `{ value: string[] }` | Fired when expanded items change | * * ```astro nocollapse * * * Item 1 * Content 1 * * * ``` * * ```js nocollapse * const accordion = document.getElementById('my-accordion'); * * accordion.addEventListener('accordion:change', (e) => { * console.log('Expanded items:', e.detail.value); * }); * ``` * * ### Programmatic Control * * You can control the accordion programmatically by dispatching an `accordion:set` event: * * ```js nocollapse * const accordion = document.getElementById('my-accordion'); * * // Expand a single item * accordion.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('accordion:set', { * detail: { value: 'item-1' } * })); * * // Expand multiple items (when multiple prop is true) * accordion.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('accordion:set', { * detail: { value: ['item-1', 'item-2'] } * })); * ``` * * ### Data Attributes * * The accordion sets these data attributes that you can use for styling or querying state: * * | Attribute | Element | Description | * |-----------|---------|-------------| * | `data-state` | accordion-item | Current state (`open` or `closed`) | * * @examples * * ### Multiple choice accordion * * * * * Is it accessible? * * * Yes. It adheres to WAI-ARIA design patterns. * * * * * Can I customize the icon? * * * Yes you can. * * * * * Can I customize the icon? * * * Yes you can. * * * * */ import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"; interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"div"> { class?: string; multiple?: boolean; defaultValue?: string; collapsible?: boolean; } const { class: className = "", multiple = false, defaultValue = "", collapsible = false, ...rest } = Astro.props as Props; ---
